title: resilience-core — P40: Domänenübergreifende Systemresilienzgröße Ρ (GenesisAeon)
description:
Implements the domain-overarching system resilience metric Ρ derived from UTAC (Universal Tipping Attractor Cascade) fixpoint analysis.

Ρ(t) = |λ*(t)| · (1 - Γ(t)/Γ_max) · (1 - Σ|C_ij|/C_critical) quantifies a system's buffer capacity against destabilising perturbations — from physical tipping points (AMOC, Arctic) to semantic drift in LLMs.

Part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (P40, domain: meta-dynamics / cross-domain).
